name: uxnan-monorepo
description: Uxnan ecosystem — Node.js workspaces (shared contracts, bridge daemon, relay).
author: Luis Donaldo Gamas Vazquez

scripts.build: npm run build -w @uxnan/shared && npm run build -w uxnan-relay && npm run build -w uxnan-bridge
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @uxnan/shared && npm run typecheck -w uxnan-relay && npm run typecheck -w uxnan-bridge
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @uxnan/shared && npm run test -w uxnan-relay && npm run test -w uxnan-bridge
